core_mechanism: asymptotic expansion of a parameter-dependent integral by decomposition into additive contributions from distinct scaling regions of the integration domain (method of regions), in which an extra 'hidden' scaling region appears on one branch of an analytic continuation and thereby breaks the analytic connection between two crossing-related limits
brief_reason: The abstract expands the five-point amplitude in the collinear limit via the Method of Regions and traces the extra kinematic dependence to a unique hidden region present in the spacelike limit but absent in the timelike one, which is exactly an added scaling-region contribution severing the analytic link between two limits.
